'''Fungus ale''' was a common [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage brewed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. It was often served as an accompanyment to [[rycrit stew]] and [[Munch-fungus/Legends|munch-fungus]]-based dishes. Fungus [[Ale/Legends|ale]] was available at [[Mal'aa's Kitchens]] in [[Kala'uun Starport]].

==Behind the scenes==
Fungus ale was first introduced to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe in the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|''Star Wars'' roleplaying game]] book ''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]'', written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] and published by [[West End Games]] in [[February]] [[1995]].
